subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The fire of Thy love hath set me aflame, and Thy remoteness and separation have brought me to ruin. Is there a path for me, O my God, unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد اشعلتنی نار حبک و اهلکتنی بعدک و فراقک هل لی سبیل یا الهی الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @presence of; reunion with God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
